features.title: Embedding 基建：news_embedding 表 + alembic 0006 + NewsEmbedder (bge-m3 复用 B031) + fixture 向量 + S1 env 闭合
features.acceptance: (1) workbench_api/db/models/news_embedding.py: NewsEmbedding SQLAlchemy 2.0 模型 按 spec §4.2 (id UUID PK via 复用 B033 _UuidString TypeDecorator / news_id UUID FK→news.id NOT NULL ON DELETE CASCADE / model TEXT NOT NULL / dim INT NOT NULL / vector JSON().with_variant(JSONB,'postgresql') NOT NULL / created_at DateTime tz=True) + __repr__；(2) workbench_api/db/repositories/news_embedding.py: NewsEmbeddingRepository(Repository[NewsEmbedding, UUID]) save_if_new (幂等 by (news_id, model) 返回 None 当 dup) + get_by_news_and_model + list_vectors_by_news_ids (批量取向量供 cosine)；(3) workbench_api/db/migrations/versions/0006_b034_news_embedding.py: create_table news_embedding + uq_news_embedding_news_model (news_id, model) + ix_news_embedding_news_id, down_revision='0005_b033_news'；alembic upgrade head → downgrade 显式目标 '0005_b033_news' 可逆 (遵 B033 F001 不用 -1/head 字面)；(4) workbench_api/news/embedder.py: NewsEmbedder(gateway: LLMGateway, repo) embed_pending(news, model='bge-m3') -> int: 取 title+' '+(summary or '') 调 gateway.embed(texts) → save_if_new；CI 测试注入 fake/recorded embedding 不打真 API；(5) data/fixtures/news/embeddings-bge-m3-sample.json: 预录 fixture news 向量 (+ sleeve_query 向量)，CI cosine 可复现；(6) **S1 soft-watch 闭合**: news/cli.py DEFAULT_SNAPSHOT_ROOT 接环境变量 WORKBENCH_NEWS_SNAPSHOT_DIR (默认回落 repo-relative)，不在生产执行；(7) **AI 边界非生成式守门 tests/safety/test_b034_no_generative_ai.py**: NewsEmbedder/embedding 路径不调 LLMGateway.chat (仅 embed)；(8) **第三方 API live-validate 建议** (参 B031 F003 教训): generator 本地手 hit 一次真 gateway embed 验证 bge-m3 envelope + dim=1024，写守门 unit test 锁 dim；(9) pytest ≥12: NewsEmbedding CRUD + save_if_new 幂等 (两次同 (news_id,model) 第二次 None) / FK cascade / repo 批量取向量 / NewsEmbedder embed_pending 用 fake gateway 落库 + 已嵌跳过 / alembic up 0006 + down 0005 / vector JSON round-trip list[float] / test_b034_no_generative_ai；(10) Gates: backend pytest ≥584 (B033 收尾 baseline 572 + ≥12) / ruff 0 / mypy 0 / alembic upgrade head + downgrade 0005 可逆 / 不引入新 secret (复用 AIGC_GATEWAY_API_KEY) / 若引入 numpy 做 cosine 须 pyproject runtime pin + test_critical_runtime_deps_pinned 扩集 (优先纯 Python 避免) / frontend 不动；(11) 不动 B033 News 表 schema / adapters / snapshot writer / B031 LLMGateway (只复用 embed) / B032 workflow.

features.title: News↔ticker/sleeve 关联：确定性 ticker 字典匹配 + 确定性 topic taxonomy + NewsAssociationService (hard match + cosine 软排序)
features.acceptance: (1) workbench_api/news/ticker_match.py: 从 universe (US Quality 27 + 4 ETF) 构建 {ticker, 公司名/别名}→ticker 确定性字典 + SEC 已知 CIK→ticker 映射；match_mentions(text) 大小写无关全词匹配 title+summary → list[ticker]；synthetic ZQ* 不入字典；(2) workbench_api/news/topics.py: 确定性 taxonomy (非 LLM) — form_type 映射 (10-K/10-Q→财报 / 8-K→重大事件 / 4→内部人交易) + 关键词规则表 (dividend→股息 / guidance→业绩指引 / upgrade·downgrade→评级变动 / merger·acquisition→并购) + 无命中→其他；tag_topics(news) -> list[str] (可多 topic)；(3) workbench_api/news/association.py: NewsAssociationService.news_for_sleeve(sleeve, *, limit, since, topic?, source?, form_type?) -> list[SleeveNewsRelevance]: 硬关联 (sleeve 成分 ticker ∩ news.ticker_mentions) + 软排序 (cosine(news_embedding, sleeve_query_embedding)，sleeve_query 由 sleeve 标签+成分 ticker 名构造经 bge-m3 嵌入，fixture 离线)；score=硬命中加权+cosine；返回带 matched_tickers/topics/score/news(title,source,url,published_at,content_sha256)；(4) sleeve→ticker 来源 wire 到既有 strategies service (schemas/strategies.py sleeve 字段)；测试用 fixture sleeve + fixture news + fixture 向量；(5) 纯 Python cosine (不新增 numpy dep) 或若用 numpy 须 pin；(6) pytest ≥10: ticker_match 全词匹配 (AAPL/Apple 命中 / 部分词 APP 不误命中 / ZQ* skip) / topics form_type 映射 + 关键词规则 + 多 topic + 其他兜底 / association hard match (ticker_mentions ∩ sleeve) / cosine 软排序顺序正确 (fixture 向量构造已知排序) / topic+source+form_type 筛选 / since 过滤 / 空 sleeve 返回空；(7) Gates: backend pytest ≥594 (F001 后 584 + ≥10) / ruff / mypy / 不引入新 secret / frontend 不动；(8) 不动 F001 news_embedding schema / B033 News 表 / strategies service 既有契约 (只读 sleeve/ticker) / B026 banner.

features.title: Recommendations 丰富面板：GET /recommendations/news API + 前端 NewsPanel (topic tag + 相关度排序 + 筛选)
features.acceptance: (1) workbench_api/schemas/recommendations.py 扩: SleeveNewsItem (news_id, title, source, url, published_at, content_sha256, topics[], matched_tickers[], score) + SleeveNewsResponse {items: SleeveNewsItem[]}；(2) workbench_api/routes/recommendations.py 扩: GET /recommendations/news (auth-gated, same-origin) query sleeve(必填)/topic?/source?/form_type?/limit? → 调 NewsAssociationService → SleeveNewsResponse；**纯结构化无 AI 文本**；(3) 前端 (protected)/recommendations: NewsPanel 组件 — 每 sleeve 下 topic tag chips + 相关度(score)排序 + source/form_type/topic 筛选器 + 外链 url (rel='noopener noreferrer')；走 same-origin /api/recommendations/news；(4) backend pytest: GET /recommendations/news 200 + auth-gated (未登录 401/redirect) + 各 filter query 生效 + sleeve 必填校验 + 响应 schema pin；(5) **AI 边界守门**: test_b034_no_generative_ai 扩集断言 /recommendations/news 响应字段集精确 pin (无 free-form AI 文本字段)；前端 vitest 断言 NewsPanel 渲染纯结构化 (无 AI 段落)；(6) frontend vitest 新增 NewsPanel 测试 (topic tag 渲染 / 排序 / 筛选交互) + Playwright e2e (recommendations 页加载 NewsPanel + 筛选)；(7) Gates: backend pytest ≥600 (F002 后 594 + ≥6) / frontend vitest ≥172 (+NewsPanel) / Playwright ≥38 (+面板 e2e) / lint 0 / typecheck pass / ruff / mypy / 不引入新 secret；(8) 不动 /recommendations/current + /export-ticket / 既有 risk/execution/tickets / B026 banner decommissioned / 设计稿一致 (若 design-draft 有 recommendations news 稿则比对，无则按最小只读面板).

features.title: Codex L1 + L2 真 VM 验收 + signoff
features.acceptance: L1 (CI 内): F001+F002+F003 全 generator 验收脚本跑通 — backend pytest ≥600 / ruff / mypy / alembic upgrade head (0006_b034_news_embedding) OK + downgrade 到 0005_b033_news OK；**AI 边界非生成式守门全过** (test_b034_no_generative_ai: embedding/关联/news 面板路径不调 LLMGateway.chat + 无 user-facing AI 生成文本)；永久边界守门全过 (含 B033 test_news_schema_metadata_only 扩集 news_embedding.vector 非 raw text + test_news_no_scheduler 仍无 scheduler/cron/apscheduler — 边界 (p)(q) 继续)；若引入 numpy 则 runtime dep 守门 (test_critical_runtime_deps_pinned)；Frontend vitest ≥172 + Playwright ≥38 不破 (含 NewsPanel)；AI Safety Eval workflow 不破 (本批次未触生成式 advisory；若 paths 命中 llm/ 保证 workflow 绿)；artifact grep AIGC_GATEWAY_API_KEY value / SEC_EDGAR_CONTACT_EMAIL value / 任何 raw filing text 泄漏 = 0 命中. L2 (真 VM): (1) curl https://trade.guangai.ai/api/health 200 + version SHA 与 main HEAD 等价 (v0.9.25 §Production/HEAD)；(2) curl /api/debug/recent-errors = {count:0,records:[]}；(3) B026 banner 仍 decommissioned (HTML grep '研究原型'/'SyntheticDataBanner' 0 hits in /strategies /reports /recommendations /risk)；(4) **Production DB alembic head = '0006_b034_news_embedding'** (VM ssh + alembic current)；(5) Production HEAD ≡ main HEAD；(6) **Production VM 仍无 workbench_api/news/scheduler.py + crontab 无 news entry + systemd 无 news unit** (边界 (q) L2 继续)；(7) Recommendations 页 NewsPanel 渲染纯结构化无 AI 文本 (浏览器手验 + 截图)；(8) Post-signoff Deploy 段 (v0.9.27 §21). Signoff: docs/test-reports/B034-news-ticker-embedding-signoff-2026-MM-DD.md 用 framework/templates/signoff-report.md (含 §Post-signoff Deploy + §Production/HEAD + §Decommission Checklist '本批次不含 decommission')；docs/screenshots/B034-news-ticker-embedding/ ≥2 PNG (Recommendations NewsPanel + alembic current 显示 0006). Framework 候选: 若 fix-round 撞 bge-m3 envelope/dim drift 或 第三方 API live-validate 同 B031 问题 → 记 signoff §Framework Learnings (达成「二例合并」可由 Planner done 阶段沉淀 v0.9.32). 更新 progress.json status→done / docs.signoff / evaluator_feedback.
